vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group-

triage_decision.reason: Changing the mode of the backup /etc/group- file is a simple file permission adjustment that does not affect authentication, networking, or critical services. The recommended chmod command follows standard STIG hardening practices and is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Incorrect permissions could expose group information; Potential for typo in command leading to wrong mode
